title: emelianthe panganensis
intro: Emelianthe panganensis, also known as Sambong, is a perennial herb native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Umbelliferae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which help to treat kidney stones and other urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Sambong include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce blood pressure, and treat various infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
